retool.title: Analytics Dashboard
retool.description_excerpt: Dataset-backed analytics dashboard; each row an object; drag-drop component editing.
retool.clawmachine_fit: MEDIUM — pattern is reusable; Retool framework not adopted

retool.title: Custom CRM
retool.description_excerpt: Customer records + interaction log + deal pipeline. Drag-drop admin panel.

retool.title: HR Analytics Dashboard
retool.description_excerpt: Employee data, performance metrics, engagement analytics.

retool.title: Security Dashboard
retool.description_excerpt: Real-time threat monitoring, incident timeline, compliance matrix.
retool.clawmachine_fit: MEDIUM — SOC vocabulary fits scout-bridge alerts

retool.title: KPI Dashboard
retool.description_excerpt: Marketing campaign metrics. Total Sales 35,031, Clicks 5,211, Impressions 85,234. Pie chart of campaign revenue. Data table with sortable columns.

retool.title: REST API Admin Panel
retool.description_excerpt: Customer CRUD backed by REST API. Read/write admin surface.

bubble.title: Bubble Dashboard gallery
bubble.description_excerpt: Community-contributed no-code dashboard templates. Free and paid. Notable: Ez Dashboard + OpenAI (58.5K installs), Responsive Webapp Template (11.9K), Analytics Dashboard (8.6K), AI SAAS Starter Kit (7.9K), Base Dashboard (4.2K), Charts/Analytics (2.9K), Soft UI Dashboard (2.7K), CodeFree Dashboard (2.0K), Vision Dashboard (1.9K), Purity UI Dashboard (1.3K), Material UI Dashboard (1.1K), Simple User Management (784).
bubble.clawmachine_fit: LOW — no-code platform not adopted; reference for pattern library only

bravo.title: Bravo Studio — Home / Templates
bravo.description_excerpt: Figma-to-native iOS/Android conversion platform. Two modes: visual Bravo Studio (Figma in, native out) or Bravo-To-Go (React Native codebase in 1-2 days, then AI-coded by the operator). Template gallery: Mindfulness, Fitness, CRM, Restaurant, Event, Personal Trainer, Recipe, School apps.
bravo.clawmachine_fit: LOW — Clawmachine is macOS desktop-only, not mobile; tool category noted for completeness
